title: Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Visakhapatnam-based team.

About Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions:
Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions!
